title: Solving a First Order Linear Recurrence Relation
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process to find the closed-form solution for a first order linear recurrence relation.
elements: Given Recurrence: aₙ = c * aₙ₋₁ + f(n)
Particular Solution: aₙ⁽ᵖ⁾ (Guess based on f(n))
relationships: Start with the given recurrence relation
Find the homogeneous solution by setting f(n)=0
Find a particular solution based on the form of f(n)
Combine solutions to form the general solution
Use the initial condition to solve for the unknown constant
Substitute the constant back in to get the final solution
